# Law & Reason
> A legal awareness platform simplifying legal concepts for everyday life in India.

## About
Law & Reason is an educational legal awareness initiative focused on simplifying legal concepts and promoting informed decision-making through accessible content and practical resources. It covers property law, family matters, consumer rights, employment issues, criminal procedure, senior citizen rights, and documentation guidance.

## Content Areas
- Legal Guides: Comprehensive guides on 8 major legal areas relevant to Indian citizens
- What Should I Do?: Step-by-step guidance for common legal situations
- Legal Myths vs Reality: Debunking common legal misconceptions
- Blog: Weekly articles on legal awareness, updates, and practical implications
- Resources: Checklists, trackers, and organisers for legal preparedness

## Important Notice
This platform is for informational and educational purposes only. Content does not constitute legal advice. No advocate-client relationship is created through this website.

## Languages
Content is available in English and Hindi.

## Contact
- Website: https://lawandreason.com
- Email: contact@lawandreason.com

## Sections
- /blog/ - Legal awareness articles and updates
- /legal-areas/ - Guides organized by legal topic
- /scenarios/ - Situation-based step-by-step guidance
- /myths/ - Legal myths debunked with factual information
